result.summary: The Iran war is causing deflation in China, impacting producers and energy costs, while also affecting the Indian stock market and causing volatility in global markets.
result.reasoning: The articles suggest a medium risk level due to the impact on global markets and economies.

signals.text: The US is at war with Iran
The ceasefire in Iran is a facade

best.description: A fragile peace holds, with minimal casualties and displacement

likely.description: A stalemate ensues, with ongoing tensions and potential for escalation

worst.description: A full-scale conflict breaks out, causing widespread destruction and loss of life

sources.name: GNews
sources.title: Trump bashes popular right-wing commentators for criticizing Iran war
